title: Audit repository dan kunci arsitektur
blocks: Inventaris semua file, status Git, konfigurasi yang sudah ada, dokumen yang saling bertentangan, serta bagian yang masih kosong. Jangan menulis fitur.
Buat ADR-001 yang mengunci domain, batas aplikasi, alur request, aturan akses database, format uang, zona waktu, dan prinsip akun otomatis.
Buat baseline backlog, daftar risiko, non-goals MVP, konvensi branch/commit, dan aturan bahwa perubahan arsitektur wajib melalui ADR baru.
Validasi seluruh route terhadap dokumen sumber, buat laporan hari pertama, dan commit fondasi dokumentasi.
acceptance: Tidak ada subdomain atau aplikasi baru di luar blueprint

title: Buat root Deno workspace dan tooling dasar
blocks: Buat root deno.jsonc, workspace globs, lockfile policy, import/catalog strategy, formatter, linter, dan strict TypeScript policy.
Buat konfigurasi minimal untuk setiap apps/* dan packages/* yang tercantum pada blueprint; jangan mengisi fitur bisnis.
Tambahkan root tasks untuk dev, format, lint, check, test, build, dan quality; tambahkan .editorconfig, .gitignore, serta VS Code settings.
Instal/cache dependency yang sudah dipilih, jalankan quality baseline, perbaiki error, dan dokumentasikan cara menjalankan workspace.
acceptance: Deno fmt dan lint dapat dijalankan dari root
Tidak ada secret nyata masuk repository

title: Scaffold lima aplikasi React + Vite
blocks: Scaffold storefront, auth, dashboard, admin, dan tracking sebagai React + Vite + TypeScript tanpa mengubah nama folder blueprint.
Tambahkan router, App shell minimal, not-found page, error boundary, loading state, dan konfigurasi base URL per aplikasi.
Hubungkan packages/ui dan packages/config secara minimal; tampilkan halaman identitas aplikasi agar setiap dev server mudah dibedakan.
Jalankan type-check dan build untuk kelima aplikasi, perbaiki masalah dependency/workspace, lalu tulis petunjuk dev.
acceptance: Tidak ada fitur ditempatkan pada aplikasi yang salah
Base API berasal dari env tervalidasi

title: Scaffold Hono API dan worker internal
blocks: Buat composition root Hono, route /health dan /ready, version prefix /v1, serta server entrypoint untuk Deno.
Buat request ID, structured logger, error envelope, not-found handler, dan exception handler tanpa membocorkan stack production.
Buat worker entrypoint, lifecycle, graceful shutdown, polling interface kosong, dan health logging; worker bukan HTTP app publik.
Tambahkan unit smoke test API/worker, jalankan lokal, dan dokumentasikan permission Deno minimum.
acceptance: Tidak ada koneksi DB dari frontend

title: Shared packages, CI, dan quality gate
blocks: Buat export surface minimal untuk config, contracts, database, auth, ui, dan email; hindari circular dependency.
Buat parser env terpusat dengan schema berbeda untuk frontend, API, worker, dan migration; tambahkan .env.example lengkap tanpa nilai rahasia.
Buat CI yang menjalankan format, lint, type-check, unit test, build, dan dependency audit sesuai kemampuan repository.
Jalankan CI-equivalent lokal, bereskan semua error, dokumentasikan dependency graph, dan tandai Foundation Gate.
acceptance: Satu perintah quality berjalan dari root
CI gagal bila quality gate gagal

title: Hubungkan Neon, Drizzle, dan migration tooling
blocks: Siapkan konfigurasi Neon development/staging/production dan dokumentasikan pooled runtime URL versus direct migration URL.
Implement packages/database client untuk API/worker, Drizzle config untuk migration, serta pencegahan import database dari frontend.
Buat connection smoke test, transaction helper, UTC timestamp convention, dan integer-IDR helper boundaries.
Jalankan koneksi development, buat migration kosong pertama, cek secret hygiene, dan tulis panduan branch database.
external: Neon project dan connection strings development diperlukan untuk koneksi nyata. Bila belum ada, selesaikan adapter dan gunakan test yang di-skip dengan alasan eksplisit.

title: Implement identity, role, profile, address, dan session schema
blocks: Model users, profiles, password credentials, roles, permissions, mappings, dan status lifecycle dengan constraint yang jelas.
Model sessions, login attempts, verification/reset/activation tokens; simpan token digest, expiry, used/revoked timestamps.
Model addresses dengan type shipping/billing, primary flags, ownership, dan normalisasi field Indonesia tanpa mengunci provider wilayah.
Buat migration, schema tests untuk unique/index/FK, factory data, dan review keamanan field sensitif.

title: Implement catalog, pricing, inventory, dan review schema
blocks: Model brands, categories bertingkat, products, product-category mapping, product variants, status, type physical/digital, dan SEO fields.
Model images/assets metadata dan pricing history dengan integer rupiah, compare-at price, effective range, serta constraint non-negatif.
Model warehouses, inventory levels, reservations, movements ledger, purchase limit, dan concurrency/version field.
Model rating/review statistics dan product_sales_stats gross/refunded/net; buat migration, index, tests, dan seed sample.
acceptance: Produk digital tidak diwajibkan memiliki berat/shipping

title: Implement cart, order, payment, invoice, shipment, dan digital schema
blocks: Model carts/cart_items untuk guest token hash atau user, active-cart uniqueness, selected/save-for-later state, dan price observation.
Model orders/order_items/order_addresses sebagai immutable snapshot, order number, amount breakdown integer, status transitions, dan idempotency link.
Model payments/payment_events, provider IDs, invoices, shipments/events, vouchers/redemptions, serta customer payment method token metadata.
Model digital assets dan entitlements/download limits; buat migration, index, FK policy, dan schema tests.
acceptance: Order item tetap terbaca meski produk berubah
Guest cart dan account cart dapat dibedakan aman

title: Implement purnajual, notifikasi, outbox, audit, seed, dan DB gate
blocks: Model returns, return_items, refunds, support tickets/messages, attachments metadata, dan verified-purchase reviews.
Model notifications dengan read_at, notification deliveries, outbox events, job attempts, audit logs, serta idempotency keys.
Buat seed roles/permissions/admin development/category/product/stock; buat data factory dan reset strategy khusus non-production.
Jalankan migration dari database kosong, seed, schema assertions, dan DB gate report; perbaiki seluruh masalah constraint/index.

title: Lengkapi API conventions, validation, CORS, CSRF, rate limit, dan RBAC context
blocks: Buat route modules, dependency injection/context, typed success/error response, request parsing, pagination envelope, dan request ID propagation.
Implement Zod validation middleware, sanitized errors, security headers, explicit CORS origin allowlist, dan credential handling.
Implement CSRF strategy untuk state-changing cookie-auth requests, rate limiter interface/storage, dan trusted proxy configuration.
Implement session loader dan RBAC/permission guard skeleton; tulis middleware tests termasuk origin, CSRF, dan error cases.
acceptance: Origin wildcard tidak dipakai dengan credentials

title: Signup, password hashing, dan verifikasi email
blocks: Implement password policy dan Argon2id wrapper yang dapat diuji, constant-time comparison semantics, serta secure random token helpers.
Implement POST /v1/auth/signup dengan transaction user/profile/credential, normalized identity, status pending_verification, dan audit event.
Implement verification token issuance, resend throttling, POST /verify-email, token rotation/revocation, dan outbox email event.
Tulis unit/integration tests untuk duplicate username/email, invalid input, token expiry/reuse, rollback, dan generic responses.
acceptance: Token plaintext hanya tampil saat dibuat untuk dikirim

title: Login username/password, session, logout, dan audit
blocks: Implement POST /auth/login dengan username normalized, generic credential error, throttling, account-status checks, dan audit login.
Implement opaque session ID, database digest, expiry/idle timeout, rotation, Secure HttpOnly host-only cookie pada API, dan GET /session.
Implement logout current, logout-all, session listing/revocation primitives, serta cleanup query untuk worker.
Tulis tests untuk valid/invalid login, lock/rate limit, cookie flags, session rotation, revoked/expired session, dan cross-origin credential flow.
acceptance: Pesan login tidak melakukan user enumeration

title: Forgot/reset password, activation, dan return_to allowlist
blocks: Implement forgot-password generic response, reset token issuance, expiry/reuse prevention, password replacement, dan optional revoke-all sessions.
Implement account activation endpoint untuk pending guest account: token verification, username final, password creation, email verification, dan activation audit.
Implement return_to parser dengan allowlist host/path, anti-open-redirect, dan safe default dashboard home.
Tulis integration tests untuk expired/reused token, reset unknown email, activation conflict, session revocation, dan malicious return_to.

title: Bangun aplikasi auth dan selesaikan Auth Gate
blocks: Bangun API client dengan credentials, CSRF bootstrap, typed errors, loading/cancellation, dan return_to handling.
Bangun halaman login dan signup dengan accessible forms, client validation yang sama kontraknya, password visibility, dan goey-toast.
Bangun verify-email, resend, forgot-password, reset-password, activation, logout result, dan invalid/expired token states.
Jalankan integration/E2E auth lokal, perbaiki responsive/accessibility, dan tulis Auth Gate report.
acceptance: User active dapat login menuju dashboard
Credentials dikirim hanya ke API resmi

title: Public catalog API: list, detail, category, brand, search
blocks: Implement repository/service query untuk active products, variant summary, effective price, available stock, rating, review count, dan net_sold.
Implement GET /products dengan page/per_page, search, category, brand, price range, stock, badges, dan sort allowlist.
Implement GET /products/{slug}, categories, brands, reviews; gunakan typed contracts dan stable response envelope.
Tulis query/integration tests, EXPLAIN critical queries bila tersedia, perbaiki index/N+1, dan seed data yang cukup untuk pagination.
acceptance: Query tidak N+1 pada card list

title: Admin RBAC dan CRUD catalog API
blocks: Definisikan permissions granular catalog.read/write/publish, inventory.adjust, order.manage, refund.manage, support.manage, dan admin role seed.
Implement admin endpoints category, brand, product, variant, price, publish/unpublish/archive dengan Zod dan optimistic concurrency.
Implement audit trail before/after yang aman, soft-delete policy, slug/SKU conflict handling, dan transaction boundaries.
Tulis authorization matrix tests: unauthenticated, customer, staff terbatas, admin; pastikan default-deny.

title: Admin catalog UI dan upload assets
blocks: Bangun admin shell, auth guard, permission-aware navigation, product list, filters, empty/loading/error states.
Bangun create/edit product, category, brand, variant, price, digital/physical fields, validation, dan unsaved-change guard.
Implement object storage adapter/presigned upload flow untuk product image; validate MIME/size/ownership dan simpan metadata saja di Neon.
Integrasikan goey-toast, optimistic UI yang aman, upload progress, build/test, dan dokumentasikan provider storage env.
external: Object storage S3-compatible diperlukan untuk upload nyata. Bila belum ada, gunakan in-memory/local development adapter dan jangan memalsukan URL production.

title: Inventory service, reservations primitive, dan admin stock UI
blocks: Implement inventory query dan movement service dengan transaction/locking, reason codes, actor, source reference, serta invariant available/reserved/sold.
Implement stock adjustment, transfer-ready abstraction, low-stock query, and reservation primitive create/commit/release/expire.
Bangun admin inventory list/detail/adjustment history dan form adjustment dengan permission plus confirmation.
Tulis concurrency/invariant tests dan audit reconciliation report untuk sample data.

title: Sold/rating statistics, review read model, dan Catalog Gate
blocks: Implement pure functions dan database operations untuk gross_sold, refunded_sold, net_sold, average rating, review count, dan Indonesian sold label.
Implement review public read API dengan moderation/verified flags dan aggregate recalculation/reconciliation command.
Tambahkan sample paid/refunded/reviewed orders untuk test, lalu verifikasi card projection dan product detail response.
Jalankan catalog/admin test suite, query review, quality gate, dan tulis Catalog Gate report.
acceptance: Label 1,2 rb benar untuk locale Indonesia
Aggregate dapat direbuild dari source events

title: Storefront shell, design system, API client, dan goey-toast wrapper
blocks: Bangun design tokens, typography, spacing, buttons, forms, cards, skeleton, dialog, pagination, badge, dan responsive containers di packages/ui.
Buat wrapper goey-toast terstandar untuk success/error/warning/info/promise, reduced-motion support, dan pesan Indonesia yang konsisten.
Bangun storefront header/nav/search/cart/account shell, API client typed, currency/date/sold formatter, dan error boundary.
Buat component tests/smoke page, audit keyboard/focus, dan build storefront baseline.

title: Product list dan product card final
blocks: Bangun /products data loader/query state dan URL pagination per_page=12 dengan cancellation serta cache policy sederhana.
Bangun ProductCard berisi image, name, brand, category, regular/selling price, discount, rating, review count, net sold, stock, badges, dan wishlist state.
Implement add-to-cart/buy-now/wishlist action stubs yang terhubung kontrak, responsive grid, skeleton, empty/error/out-of-stock states.
Tulis component/integration tests untuk sold label, price discount, stock, new badge, action accessibility, dan mobile layout.
acceptance: Terjual 0 dapat diganti Baru sesuai rule

title: Product detail, variants, gallery, reviews, dan related products
blocks: Bangun /products/{slug} loader dengan not-found/inactive states dan metadata dasar.
Bangun gallery, product summary, variant selector, effective price, stock, quantity limits, add-cart, buy-now, wishlist, dan shipping/digital indicator.
Bangun tabs/accordion description, benefits, composition, usage, warning, shipping, reviews, serta related products.
Tulis tests untuk variant URL/state, sold/stock display, quantity clamping, image alt, and out-of-stock behavior.

title: Search, category, brand, filters, sort, dan URL state
blocks: Bangun /search, /categories/{slug}, dan /brands/{slug} menggunakan endpoint yang sama dan URL query sebagai source of truth.
Implement keyword debounce, filter category/brand/price/stock/rating/promo, sort allowlist, reset filter, dan mobile filter drawer.
Jaga browser back/forward, shareable URLs, page reset saat filter berubah, serta empty suggestions/popular products.
Tulis query-state tests, accessibility, and API error recovery; build storefront.
acceptance: Invalid query jatuh ke default aman
Filter tidak menghapus parameter yang relevan

title: Wishlist guest/account dan Storefront Gate
blocks: Implement guest wishlist local storage dengan versioned schema, graceful corruption handling, dan no-sensitive-data rule.
Implement account wishlist API list/add/remove, ownership, duplicate prevention, stock/price projection, dan optional merge after login.
Integrasikan heart state pada list/detail, optimistic update rollback, goey-toast, dan dashboard deep link.
Jalankan storefront tests, accessibility smoke, performance baseline, dan tulis Storefront Gate report.
acceptance: Product data tetap berasal dari server

title: Cart API untuk guest dan account
blocks: Implement guest cart token issuance dengan random opaque token, server-side digest, expiry/rotation, serta one-active-cart invariant.
Implement GET cart dan add/update/remove/clear item transactionally untuk guest atau session user.
Hitung line totals/discount/subtotal di server, return item status available/out_of_stock/price_changed/inactive/quantity_adjusted.
Tulis authorization, token, validation, concurrent update, purchase limit, and total calculation tests.
acceptance: Browser tidak menjadi source of truth cart
Guest token tidak disimpan plaintext DB
User tidak dapat membaca cart lain

title: Cart merge, revalidation, voucher, dan save-for-later
blocks: Implement POST /cart/merge transaction: merge variant sama, clamp stock/purchase limit, latest price, merged marker, dan idempotency.
Implement revalidation saat cart dibaca/diubah, warning changes, inactive cleanup policy, dan race-safe versioning.
Implement save-for-later dan voucher validation/application dasar dengan explicit rule engine serta integer amounts.
Tulis merge matrix tests, price/stock changes, duplicate retry, voucher edge cases, dan rollback behavior.

title: Cart UI lengkap
blocks: Bangun /cart loader dan cart summary untuk guest/session dengan states loading/empty/error/expired token.
Bangun item table/card responsive, select checkout, increment/decrement, remove, clear, save-for-later, voucher, dan order note.
Tampilkan server totals, price/stock warnings, shipping estimate placeholder yang jelas, and checkout eligibility.
Tulis UI/integration tests, keyboard/focus, optimistic mutation rollback, goey-toast, and build storefront.

title: Checkout address/shipping/review, order snapshot, dan stock reservation
blocks: Implement address validation/persistence and guest address input, shipping option adapter dengan deterministic mock, serta digital-only no-shipping branch.
Implement checkout validate/shipping-options endpoints dan server recomputation untuk product, stock, price, voucher, shipping, tax, total.
Implement POST /checkout/orders dengan idempotency key, immutable order/address/item snapshot, dan inventory reservation expiry.
Bangun address/shipping/review UI state machine, recovery after refresh, tests untuk mixed cart, stale price/stock, duplicate submit, and reservation release schedule.
acceptance: Reservation punya expiry dan release path
external: Real shipping provider dapat ditambahkan nanti melalui adapter. Mock harus jelas hanya untuk development/test.

title: Payment adapter, verified webhook, dan Checkout Gate
blocks: Definisikan PaymentProvider interface dan implement deterministic sandbox/mock provider tanpa menyimpan raw card data.
Implement create payment intent/session, payment page handoff, pending/success/failed UI, dan provider reference persistence.
Implement webhook signature verification contract, unique provider event, state transition validation, transaction order paid + reservation commit + outbox.
Tulis duplicate/out-of-order/invalid-signature tests, browser-success-not-source-of-truth test, quality gate, dan Checkout Gate report.
acceptance: Order paid hanya lewat event terverifikasi
Raw payment secret/card data tidak dilog
external: Pilih dan siapkan payment gateway sandbox untuk integrasi nyata. Sampai tersedia, mock provider harus mencakup success, pending, failed, duplicate, dan invalid webhook.

title: Transactional outbox worker, locking, retry, dan cleanup jobs
blocks: Implement outbox poller dengan claim/lock aman, batch size, available_at, SKIP LOCKED atau strategi setara, correlation ID, dan graceful shutdown.
Implement handler registry, idempotency/dedupe, exponential backoff with cap/jitter, max attempts, failed state/dead-letter semantics.
Implement scheduled cleanup untuk expired session/token, release expired inventory reservation, dan stale guest cart policy.
Tulis worker concurrency/retry/crash-recovery tests serta operational commands untuk inspect/retry failed job.
acceptance: Dua worker tidak memproses row yang sama bersamaan

title: Invoice PDF, object storage, dan transactional email
blocks: Implement invoice number, immutable invoice data snapshot, PDF renderer, locale id-ID, integer amounts, and safe file naming.
Upload invoice ke private object storage, simpan metadata, dan buat authenticated/signed download path dengan expiry.
Implement EmailProvider interface, invoice/order/verification/reset/activation templates, delivery records, retry categories, and provider message ID.
Hubungkan paid outbox ke invoice generation dan email; test PDF metadata, template rendering, provider failure/retry, and no public invoice leakage.
acceptance: Invoice total sama dengan order snapshot
external: Email transactional provider dan object storage credentials diperlukan untuk delivery nyata. Gunakan fake provider dalam test dan development tanpa mengklaim email terkirim.

title: Akun otomatis setelah guest payment dan claim order aman
blocks: Implement paid-order handler: bila guest email belum memiliki user, buat pending_activation user/profile dan activation token dalam transaksi idempotent.
Bila email sudah terkait akun, jangan auto-link hanya dari input guest; buat secure claim/notification flow yang memverifikasi kepemilikan.
Hubungkan activation UI/API ke pending order claim, username selection, password creation, verified email, session issue, dan redirect dashboard order.
Tulis duplicate paid event, existing account, expired token, conflicting username, replay, and order-ownership tests.
acceptance: Akun hanya dibuat setelah payment verified
Event ulang tidak membuat akun ganda
Order tidak ditautkan ke akun salah

title: Persistent notifications, read/unread API, dan SSE
blocks: Implement notification creation handlers dari business outbox dengan dedupe_key, user ownership, type, data payload version, dan created_at.
Implement list/pagination/unread-count/read/read-all endpoints; status hanya derived dari read_at.
Implement authenticated SSE stream dengan heartbeat, reconnect guidance, bounded resources, last event cursor/refresh strategy, dan authorization.
Tulis SSE/read tests termasuk disconnect/reconnect, unauthorized stream, duplicate events, and database-source-of-truth behavior.
acceptance: User tidak menerima notifikasi user lain

title: Commerce E2E, failure recovery, dan Integration Gate
blocks: Buat integration fixture end-to-end: product aktif, guest cart, checkout, order pending, verified payment, stock commit, stats, outbox, invoice, email record, account pending.
Lanjutkan aktivasi, login, session, order ownership, notification, invoice access, dan digital entitlement bila item digital.
Tambahkan failure matrix: price/stock change, expired reservation, duplicate/out-of-order webhook, worker crash/retry, email fail, expired activation.
Jalankan seluruh integration suite dari database test bersih, perbaiki flakiness, dan tulis Integration Gate report.
acceptance: Happy path berjalan tanpa manual DB edit
Duplicate events tidak menggandakan side effect

title: Dashboard shell, route guards, navigation, dan home summary
blocks: Bangun dashboard API client/session bootstrap, protected route guard, unauthorized/expired flow, error boundary, dan app layout.
Bangun desktop sidebar sesuai blueprint dan mobile nav Home/Orders/Cart/Notifications/Account; Cart link kembali ke shop.
Implement home summary endpoint dan UI: active orders, latest, shipping, total purchases, unread notification, unpaid status, recommendation link.
Tulis dashboard shell/home tests, loading/empty/error states, accessibility, and responsive build.
acceptance: Unauthenticated diarahkan ke auth dengan safe return_to

title: Profile, security, sessions, addresses, dan payment method metadata
blocks: Implement GET/PATCH /me dan profile UI untuk name, email display/policy, phone, avatar metadata, joined date, and validation.
Implement change password, sessions list, revoke one/all other sessions, login history summary, and security feedback.
Implement addresses CRUD/default shipping/billing with ownership and dashboard UI.
Implement tokenized payment-method metadata list/delete only if provider supports it; no raw card data; test ownership and responsive forms.

title: Orders list, detail, tracking, buy-again, dan invoice link
blocks: Implement user-scoped orders list with tabs Semua/Aktif/Selesai/Dibatalkan/Refund, stable pagination, and summary fields.
Implement order detail endpoint/UI with snapshots, payment/shipping/status timeline, totals, invoice and product links.
Implement tracking endpoint/UI and buy-again service yang revalidasi product/variant/price/stock sebelum menambah cart.
Tulis ownership/IDOR tests, status display, mixed digital/physical tracking, buy-again warnings, and responsive detail tests.
acceptance: Detail tidak bergantung pada product aktif

title: History, invoices, dan digital downloads
blocks: Implement /history default per_page=5 dengan status/year/start_date/end_date, total transactions/nominal/completed/refund summary.
Bangun history UI, filter URL state, IDR/time formatting id-ID Asia/Jakarta, buy-again, review, and invoice actions.
Implement invoices list/detail/download authorization dan signed/streamed private file access.
Implement digital entitlements/download list, expiry/download-count checks, secure download, and tests for ownership/tampering.

title: Notifications, wishlist, reviews, settings, dan Dashboard Gate
blocks: Bangun notification center list/read/read-all/unread badge dan SSE listener dengan reconnect, REST refresh, and goey-toast for live events.
Bangun account wishlist page dengan stock/price projection, remove/add-cart/product links.
Implement eligible verified-purchase reviews list/create/edit/delete policy dan settings profile/security/notification/privacy shells.
Jalankan dashboard tests, accessibility/mobile audit, build, dan tulis Dashboard Gate report.
acceptance: Toast live tidak menggantikan database record
Review hanya untuk eligible order item

title: Returns dan refunds end-to-end
blocks: Implement return eligibility policy by order item/status/window, create request, reason, quantity, evidence metadata, communication history.
Implement dashboard returns/refunds list/detail/form/upload flow dan user ownership.
Implement admin review/approve/reject/receive/refund actions dengan permission, provider refund adapter, audit, and idempotency.
Update finalized refund to refunded_sold/net_sold and optional restock decision; test partial/full/duplicate/refund-failure cases.
acceptance: Refund tidak otomatis restock tanpa keputusan

title: Support FAQ, tickets, messages, dan attachments
blocks: Implement public/account FAQ read model and support ticket create/list/detail with category, order link validation, priority/status, and ownership.
Implement ticket message thread and private attachment upload/download with MIME/size/authorization rules.
Bangun dashboard support UI dan admin queue/detail/reply/assign/status workflow dengan notifications/outbox.
Tulis IDOR, attachment, spam/rate-limit, closed-ticket, and notification tests.
acceptance: Order link hanya bila milik user

title: Admin orders, payments, invoices, dan customers
blocks: Implement admin order list/detail filters, status timeline, customer snapshot, items, totals, payment, shipment, invoice, and support links.
Implement permitted operations: mark processing, attach shipment, cancel rules, resend invoice, retry job, without editing immutable financial snapshot arbitrarily.
Implement payment events/invoice/customer list/detail with least-privilege data masking and no password/session secret exposure.
Bangun admin UI, audit all state changes, and authorization/status-transition tests.

title: Admin review moderation, inventory operations, audit, dan operational dashboard
blocks: Implement review moderation queue with publish/reject policy, reason, audit, and aggregate recalculation.
Complete admin catalog/inventory operations including low stock, movement history, product status, and bulk action safeguards.
Build operational dashboard cards for orders/payments/outbox/email/low-stock using bounded queries and permission-aware metrics.
Build audit log viewer with filters/redaction, test admin boundaries, and responsive admin build.
acceptance: Moderation does not edit review content silently

title: Public tracking, shipment events, dan Operations Gate
blocks: Implement opaque public tracking token issue/revoke/expiry and endpoint projection that exposes only safe shipment/order fields.
Implement shipment provider adapter/webhook or deterministic mock, unique event handling, timeline ordering, and order notification outbox.
Bangun tracking app with token route, invalid/expired/not-found states, timeline, estimated delivery, and no account PII.
Run operations integration tests, security review tracking enumeration, build admin/dashboard/tracking, and write Operations Gate report.
acceptance: Order ID mentah bukan public credential
external: Real courier integration dapat mengganti mock adapter setelah akun provider dan webhook secret tersedia.

title: Lengkapi unit/integration test, factories, dan coverage gate
blocks: Audit test coverage by domain and map every critical invariant/status transition to at least one test.
Lengkapi unit tests price/discount/sold/cart merge/voucher/order total/token expiry/permission/status transition.
Lengkapi integration tests auth/catalog/cart/reservation/payment/refund/outbox/invoice/notification/support menggunakan isolated test DB/branch.
Stabilkan factories, time/random/provider fakes, parallelization policy, coverage report, and fail threshold.

title: E2E browser, accessibility, responsive, dan failure journeys
blocks: Set up E2E runner and isolated environment; seed deterministic user/products/payment mock and launch all required apps.
Automate guest product→cart→checkout→paid→invoice/account activation→login→dashboard order journey.
Automate signup/login/recovery, cart merge, wishlist, history pagination, notification reconnect, return, support, admin operations, and public tracking.
Run accessibility keyboard/focus/labels/contrast checks and desktop/mobile viewport suite; capture artifacts on failure.
acceptance: Core purchase path tested in browser

title: Security, observability, backup/restore, dan operational runbooks
blocks: Threat-model auth/payment/upload/IDOR/webhook/SSE/tracking/admin; remediate high risks, headers, CSRF, CORS, rate limit, validation, and authorization.
Audit dependency/secrets/log redaction, cookie flags, token handling, upload controls, CSP, and production error responses.
Implement structured logs, health/readiness, metrics/alerts for errors, latency, webhook failures, email failures, outbox backlog, and stock anomalies.
Document and rehearse Neon backup/restore or branch-based recovery, migration rollback/forward, incident response, and provider outage runbooks.

title: Deploy staging, migration rehearsal, DNS/CORS/cookie validation, dan UAT
blocks: Create staging environment matrix, deployment configs for each existing app, secret injection, build commands, and Neon staging branch.
Run migration rehearsal from production-like snapshot, deploy API/worker first then frontends, and verify health/readiness.
Configure only documented DNS hosts, HTTPS, CORS allowlist, API host-only secure session cookie, CSP, object storage, payment/email/shipping webhooks.
Run staging smoke/E2E/UAT, capture defects, fix release blockers, freeze release candidate, and document rollback.
external: Deployment platform, DNS access, Neon staging, email/payment/storage/shipping sandbox credentials diperlukan untuk UAT penuh.

title: Production release, smoke test, rollback readiness, dan handover
blocks: Review release diff, dependency lock, secrets, database migration, backup/restore point, feature flags, provider production settings, and change approval.
Run production migration with logs, deploy API and worker, verify health, then deploy storefront/auth/dashboard/admin/tracking and public site as applicable.

Run production smoke: login, products, cart, provider-approved controlled payment verification, webhook, invoice, email, activation, dashboard, admin, tracking, notification. Jangan memakai sandbox credential pada production.
Monitor errors/latency/outbox/webhooks/email, execute rollback if thresholds breached, finalize release notes, handover docs, and 24-hour observation checklist.
external: Production credentials dan explicit change approval diperlukan. Jangan pernah menguji transaksi riil tanpa prosedur pembayaran aman yang disetujui.
